prompt: Add the dog from the first image to the second image, chasing the bird from the third image down the road of the second image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 2. Integrate the dog from image 1 onto the snowy road, positioning it in the mid-ground, slightly to the right. Place the bird from image 3 further down the road, ahead of the dog and closer to the center of the path. The dog should be depicted in a dynamic running pose, actively chasing the bird along the snow-covered forest road, ensuring both subjects are seamlessly integrated into the existing winter environment of image 2.
objects: Dog from image 1, in a running pose, in mid-ground slightly to the right
Bird from image 3, ahead of the dog, closer to the center of the path
